text.title: Weekly Architecture Review Agenda Template Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying weekly-arch-review-agenda-template must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: decisions_made list empty for ≥3 consecutive weeks.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key before serialising.

example.note: All required fields populated; forbidden patterns absent.
Missing the first required field — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
